response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is severely overqualified and misaligned with the junior role, lacks demonstrable Java project experience, has only basic German proficiency (a hard requirement), and lists implausible employment dates (e.g., Google since 2025, founder of Amazon while employed at Google).
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Demonstrated agile practices and DevOps infrastructure experience
concerns: Only basic German proficiency, but fluent German is a mandatory requirement
Claims senior roles at Google and Meta while being a junior candidate — raises credibility issues
Minimal evidence of Java usage in recent roles, despite Java being the core requirement
